chunks.title: Famine and Atonement with Gibeonites
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering the famine, the negotiation with the Gibeonites, the execution of Saul's descendants, Rizpah's vigil, and the burial of Saul and Jonathan.

chunks.title: Wars Against the Giants
chunks.reason: A catalog of four distinct battles where David's men defeated specific giants from Gath.
